error_signature: cannot save a single object list as an object variable
title: Incompatible variable type when saving API response
symptom: The workflow indicates success for variable updates, but only the first variable is updated. The second variable remains unchanged despite the workflow reporting success.
applies_when: Using API calls to fetch data
Expecting a single object but receiving an array
not_this_if: The API response is correctly formatted as a single object
root_cause: The issue arises when an API call returns a list containing a single object, which cannot be saved as an object variable in WeWeb. The workflow does not flag this as an error during testing, leading to confusion.
fix_steps: Check the API response format to ensure it matches the expected type.
If receiving an array, adjust the variable type in WeWeb to accept an array instead of an object.
Test the workflow again to confirm the variable updates correctly.
agent_instruction: Ensure the API response is formatted correctly and adjust the variable type in WeWeb accordingly.
